title: prosphysis
intro: Prosphysis is a genus of plants in the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the spurge family, which includes a variety of succulent plants native to southern Africa. The medicinal properties of Prosphysis plants are due to the presence of latex and alkaloids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Prosphysis plants include their ability to reduce inflammation, treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Prosphysis plants include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which can be made by drying and processing the plant's leaves, stems, and roots.
